subcodes.first_line: We make mention of Our handmaiden who hearkened unto Our Call, attained unto Our recognition, and drank of the Kawthar of Our love from the hands of Our Command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر امتی التی سمعت ندائی و فازت بعرفانی و شربت کوثر حبی من ایادی امری
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
